programme.title: Nomads Of The Serengeti
programme.desc: S1E3 - Ngorongoro: Head into the wildlife haven on the edge of the Serengeti. Formed out of a volcanic eruption, it's home to the highest concentration of mammals in the world. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Alaskan Summer
programme.desc: Witness how summer turns Alaska into a true wildlife paradise, from the bears fishing in its salmon-filled waterways to the millions of migratory birds that flock there.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: S1E1 - A Penguin Proposal: A penguin uses a small pebble as a token of love to symbolise his proposal, while a lemur in Madagascar uses millipedes as a form of pest control. (1 of 6)

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: S1E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs: Join a line of hermit crabs as they prepare for a very orderly house swap on a Belize beach. Plus, meet a chimpanzee with a cat as a pet. (2 of 6)

programme.title: Africa's Wild Roommates: How...
programme.desc: ...Animals Share Bed and Board. When animals create homes in the African savannah, roommates - from insects to mammals - move in, and they all contribute something to the home.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: S1E3 - Collar Complications: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Big Beasts: Last Of The Giants
programme.desc: S1E1 - The Americas: Patrick Aryee checks out the biggest animals on Earth as he reveals why size matters in the natural world. First stop, the Americas. (1 of 3)

programme.title: Big Beasts: Last Of The Giants
programme.desc: S1E2 - Australia and Asia: Patrick Aryee gets eye to eye with Komodo dragons, orangutans and giant pandas as he explores why these creatures all came to be supersized. (2 of 3)

programme.title: Big Beasts: Last Of The Giants
programme.desc: S1E3 - Africa: Patrick Aryee tracks down great white sharks, desert giraffes and one of the last 'tusker' elephants as he explores the challenges facing nature's giants. (3 of 3)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Kingdom Of Plants
programme.desc: S1E1 - Life in the Wet Zone: David Attenborough explores The Royal Botanic Gardens at Kew, revealing the astonishing secret life of plants. (1 of 3)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Kingdom Of Plants
programme.desc: S1E2 - David Attenborough explores the secret life of plants at Kew, examining everything from a huge underground specimen to a snappy carnivorous variety. (2 of 3)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Kingdom Of Plants
programme.desc: S1E3 - David Attenborough concludes his absorbing journey around London's Kew Gardens, as he discovers how some plants have evolved to shed their dependency on water. (3 of 3)

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: S2E4 - The Lost Prince: Young hyena Mizumu musters all his strength, intelligence and cunning for the biggest challenge of his life - finding a new clan. (S2, ep 4)

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running With The Pack
programme.desc: S1E3 - Stork Pack in Trouble: Agonise over a lost Stork pack puppy, then tussle with the Manzi pups before joining Julz on a search for the missing Kakuli pack. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running With The Pack
programme.desc: S1E4 - Big Cats, Big Trouble: Dodge a leopard with the Manzi dogs, hunt with the Kakuli pack as they're foiled by a puku antelope and evade charging elephants with the Stork pack. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Queer Planet
programme.desc: New & Exclusive. Is there gender-specific behaviour in animals? Are flamingos and king penguins more tolerant than humans? Experts reveal their findings about sexuality in the animal world.

programme.title: Camp Zambia
programme.desc: S1E2 - African Standoff: The team hears baboon alarm calls and heads to the bush to investigate. They find Kamuti, the local leopard whose kill is under threat from a prowling lioness. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: S2E4 - The Lost Prince: Young hyena Mizumu musters all his strength, intelligence and cunning for the biggest challenge of his life - finding a new clan. (S2, ep 4)

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running With The Pack
programme.desc: S1E3 - Stork Pack in Trouble: Agonise over a lost Stork pack puppy, then tussle with the Manzi pups before joining Julz on a search for the missing Kakuli pack. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running With The Pack
programme.desc: S1E4 - Big Cats, Big Trouble: Dodge a leopard with the Manzi dogs, hunt with the Kakuli pack as they're foiled by a puku antelope and evade charging elephants with the Stork pack. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E1 - New & Exclusive. Constructors: Some of the world's smallest creatures create the planet's best architecture. Discover how these tiny builders pass on this remarkable skill. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E2 - New & Exclusive. Collectors: Creatures of all shapes and sizes have become experts in harvesting fruit. Learn how they use it to bolster their territories and conquer new ones. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E3 - New & Exclusive. Gardeners: Across the globe, animals have developed remarkably innovative ways of gardening. Discover how they prune trees, make use of natural waste and more. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E4 - New & Exclusive. Musicians: Nature is full of animal songs. Discover how creatures use these sounds to protect territory, attract mates, warn of danger and establish bonds. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E5 - New & Exclusive. Exterminators: Discover how nature's pest controllers keep on top of bothersome bugs, beetles and beasts and help restore balance in the natural world. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E6 - New & Exclusive. Butchers: Get to know nature's biggest carnivores. Follow this eclectic group of creatures as they hunt and even disembowel their victims... (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E7 - New & Exclusive. Thieves: There are some very talented thieves in the animal kingdom. Meet the most stealthy animal scavengers on the planet as they search for a good meal. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: S1E8 - New & Exclusive. Diggers: There's no life without death, which is why some creatures have taken on the role of gravedigger. Discover how they make bodies disappear. (S1, ep 8)

programme.title: Nomads Of The Serengeti
programme.desc: S1E4 - Snows of Kilimanjaro: Jean Du Plessis climbs Mount Kilimanjaro on a mission to see whether climate change is affecting snow on the top of Africa's highest free-standing peak. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Nomads Of The Serengeti
programme.desc: S1E5 - Cradle of Mankind: Safari guide Jean Du Plessis heads to Mahale Mountains National Park to get up close and personal with Tanzania's wild chimpanzees. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: After The Wildfires
programme.desc: New. A year after the tragic fire season that devastated Australia, this documentary focuses on the animals that struggled to survive, and the people who gave their all to save them.

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..
programme.desc: S1E1 - ...Family. Biologist Patrick Aryee starts his journey in Asia as he reveals the amazing stories of how each of the world's primate species came to be. (1 of 3)

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..

programme.title: Surviving The Amazon
programme.desc: S1E3 - A Life Among Trees: Swing through the canopies of the Amazon's trees with a look at its 1,200 species and the creatures who call their leaves, branches and shadows home. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Surviving The Amazon
programme.desc: S1E4 - Dry Season: Faced with little water and space, animals must learn new skills to survive the dry season. If they don't, they'll quickly become the vultures' next feast. (S1, ep 4)

programme.desc: In Louisiana, Danielle calls the shots from home as the guys get in over their heads, while Frank "inks" a side deal. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike struggles to free a huge vintage sign. Also, the guys try to seal an impossible deal, and Danielle and Frank bask in a final joyride in a 1956 Chevy. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys look into the collection of a reclusive and mysterious businessman called "the Colonel," who goes to great lengths to conceal his identity. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While combing through a collection, Mike spots the headlights of a rare Ford; and the guys pick a Tennessee home hiding a big secret. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick a North Carolina collection of weird and wonderful circus and sideshow memorabilia. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys cruise through Florida, where they go hog wild in a former juke joint-turned-picker's paradise. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike has an epiphany in New Hampshire when he finds a collection of microcars. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Wolfe brothers drop in on a historic San Francisco hotel that's home to an awesome collection of classic cars and uncover a hidden stash of spooky carnival relics. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Krystal, a witch, looks to clear a curse of a cyst from her face. Keven wants to get a butt lipoma removed to get his tush back into a regular shape. Raquel, Dr. Lee's esthetician BFF, almost suffocates Dr. Lee with love and a facial. (Repeat). (Reality, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.desc: A woman embraces her facial hair. A Nepalese man is born with three legs. In the USA, a woman is covered in bubble-shaped growths. programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: In China, a woman lives with backward hands and feet. And in Africa, a young girl gets a new face, and a woman searches for a treatment for an enormous mystery tumor. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality, Drama, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A girl who is born without thighs and arms thrives. A boy undergoes surgeries. (Repeat). (Documentary, Drama)

programme.desc: In Nepal, a 16-foot-tall senior vies for the title of smallest man. A 200-pound stomach tumor erupts from a man. programme.desc: A man is in love with his life-size doll, treating it as his wife; a woman picks scabs off her body up to two hours a day. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A woman has mobility issues while her weight tops 600 pounds, but she fights to get control of her obesity and save her relationship with her troubled son. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A woman who weighs more than 600 pounds experiences a sudden loss, and must think about her own life and what will happen to her children. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 700-lb. man who has a family history of obesity vows to change his lifestyle to be eligible for a gastric-bypass procedure, and is determined not to die the way his father and sister did. If all goes well, he even hopes to date again. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A man who weighs 630 pounds is completely dependent on his family, but he must learn to control his bad temper and face the truth behind his issues if he's ever going to lose weight. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 32-year-old woman who weighs nearly 600 pounds is desperate to survive for her kids and avoid her mother's tragic fate of dying at age 50 from obesity. Also: Two women prepare for skin-removal surgery. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A women's extreme weight resides in her misshapen legs, which are so massive with severe lymphedema that gastric surgery is her only chance of survival. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Two brothers weigh nearly 1400 pounds combined, and their father drives them 35 hours to see a doctor even though they can't stand each other. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Conclusion. Time is running out for two brothers when one of them focuses on his new career instead of his diet, and the other spends a year on a weight-loss program but is completely noncompliant. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: After falling in love in rehab, Lee and Rena battle health issues while attempting to save their relationship and their lives. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Janine's extreme obesity leaves her nearly immobile, and even the first steps on her weight loss journey may prove to be too difficult. She must overcome both her physical and emotional pain if she is to live a normal life again. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 23-year-old woman who weighs more than 600 pounds is dependent on her family and her boyfriend for the simplest tasks, so she decides to have weight-loss surgery that will force her to move 2000 miles away from her loved ones. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 37-year-old woman who weighs more than 600 pounds is committed to losing weight, but is sidetracked by a sudden loss of mobility due to a medical disorder that could stall her progress. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Liz is completely bed bound with severe lymphedema that makes it impossible to walk. Utterly isolated, with no friends, she battles depression, and lives with her mom who is too ill to take care of her. Liz desperately wants to become mobile. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Karina's weight has placed a burden on her parents and driven a wedge between her and her sister. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: With severe lymphedema, Mercedes can barely stand and only cares for her two small children with the help of her extended family. Dr. Now can give her the tools to lose weight, but to succeed she must face the trauma inflicted by her late abusive father. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Lisa's struggle with her weight began as a child and significantly worsened after witnessing her brother's murder. Now bedridden and unable to care for herself, Lisa must find a way to lose the weight or she will never see her grandchildren grow up. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Tamy's eating addiction has caused her weight to balloon over 500 pounds. She has become a hermit after years of shame, and hopes to restart her life so she can take better care of her son, Zachary. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Fearing that he'll suffer the same fate as older brother David, who is now 700 pounds and unable to work, Benji hopes to be able to support both himself and his brother on their life-or-death weight loss journey. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A former plus-size model and "big is beautiful" advocate, Renee now realizes the mortal mistakes she has made as her weight swells to 600 pounds and her health deteriorates. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Fearing that he'll suffer the same fate as older brother David, who is now 700 pounds and unable to work, Benji hopes to be able to support both himself and his brother on their life-or-death weight loss journey. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A former plus-size model and "big is beautiful" advocate, Renee now realizes the mortal mistakes she has made as her weight swells to 600 pounds and her health deteriorates. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Tamy's eating addiction has caused her weight to balloon over 500 pounds. She has become a hermit after years of shame, and hopes to restart her life so she can take better care of her son, Zachary. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Jennifer and daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A man's food addiction cost him his marriage and visits with his daughter while his weight ballooned to 650 pounds, but he tries to take control of his life by committing to a strict diet so he can be approved for weight-loss surgery. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A Detroit woman who used to represent the city's healthy eating program weighs more than 700 pounds and is confined to her bed, and her only hope may be a gastric bypass. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Devastated by two miscarriages due to her weight, Schenee is desperate to start a family and stop relying on her husband, Freddie, to take care of her, but there's no guarantee that weight-loss surgery be able to fix her fertility issues as well as her marriage. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 24-year-old woman weighs more than 600 pounds and is fighting for her life after a difficult childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: With the support of his fiancée, Kathryn, Robert turns to Dr. Nowzaradan in a desperate attempt to save his life. He tries to reverse a lifelong food addiction that has left him bed-bound, saddled with grotesque lymphedema and nearly 900 pounds. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: At 700-lbs, Brianne seeks out Dr. Nowzaradan's help to save her life, but she faces some unexpected challenges along the way when her husband, Rick, suffers from a heart attack. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Octavia has been bed bound for nearly a year when she decides to make a trip to Houston to get help from Dr. Now, but when it turns out that her best friend is also her worst enabler, Octavia will have to choose between old habits and a new life. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Robin and her brother, Chris, are obese and plan to visit Dr. Now, but Chris suffers a stroke and can't go. However, Chris's son, Garrett, may join the journey with his aunt. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A college graduate with a once-promising career, Justin has eaten his life away to the point of never leaving the house for anything but food. Now only the help of Dr. Now's weight-loss program can restore his hopes of living a happy, productive life. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Robin and her brother, Chris, are obese and plan to visit Dr. Now, but Chris suffers a stroke and can't go. However, Chris's son, Garrett, may join the journey with his aunt. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A college graduate with a once-promising career, Justin has eaten his life away to the point of never leaving the house for anything but food. Now only the help of Dr. Now's weight-loss program can restore his hopes of living a happy, productive life. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: Octavia has been bed bound for nearly a year when she decides to make a trip to Houston to get help from Dr. Now, but when it turns out that her best friend is also her worst enabler, Octavia will have to choose between old habits and a new life. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A baby experiences a rash, then frequent fevers, followed by ear and sinus infections. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A boy's abnormal fingers and indented chest prompt an examination; a newborn develops a troubling cough. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A 3-year-old girl is examined after her motor skills deteriorate; a young mother experiences extreme fatigue after the birth of her second child. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A teenager loses clumps of hair, suffers shooting pains in her jaw and her face starts to cave in; a patient loses coordination in what was construed as a case of food poisoning. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: Doctors suspect an infection is the culprit behind a woman's chills, fevers and crippling migraines; painful, fatty lumps appear on a man's body shortly after he begins a rigorous military training program. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A father of 6-year-old triplets experiences a series of troubling but seemingly unrelated symptoms after minor surgery, including pain and swelling in his legs, followed by nausea and insomnia, and a bright red rash on his neck. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A baby experiences a rash, then frequent fevers, followed by ear and sinus infections. (Repeat). (Documentary, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: A woman must live in a camper in her backyard because her house is so cluttered with things she's found in dumpsters, but her neighbors are threatening to sue unless she cleans it up in a hurry. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Clinical psychologists are called in to help compulsive hoarders, including a woman whose neighbor reports her to the health department; and another who is unable to rent out the adjoining property because of the cluttered condition of her own. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: A woman denies being a hoarder, but she faces the condemnation of her home due to its clutter and pest infestation. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: A former Hollywood model who has kept her hoarding a secret is in danger of losing her home. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Examining the case of a woman who's been sent to jail four times by local authorities because of her hoarding. Also: A couple who bought a house without looking at it now own the hoard that's inside. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: A Canadian rock-and-roll singer who has accumulated a large collection of souvenirs and memorabilia risks losing his family unless he can part with his clutter. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Twin sisters who are hoarders have already had one home condemned due to their habits, and are in danger of losing another. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
programme.desc: A landlord's secret hoard is a threat to a woman and her children, who live downstairs, and is to blame for mold, mice and flea infestations. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Roy is drawn from the safety of his cell to find a vengeful Griff waiting for his return. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah regrets her reckless actions, and Griff uses lethal threats to force Roy to confess. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Chris must deal with reindeer bullies to keep harmony in the herd. With ice finally forming on Hudson Bay as polar bear season wraps up, the Alert team releases eight bears back into the wild. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: The new leaders of the Polar Bear Alert team intercept a polar bear mom and her two cubs, helicopter-lifting them to safety. Dr. Chris rushes to treat and release an injured great horned owl. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Skindigenous
programme.desc: Isaac Murdoch and Christi Belcourt study ancient indigenous markings and tattooing them to pass it on. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Skindigenous
programme.desc: Julie Paama-Pengelly is a veteran in the revitalization of ta moko Maori tattooing. Over time, many misconceptions have surfaced about who has the right to wear and practice ta moko. Julie is one of the first women to practice in the male-dominated field. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: In the Season 4 premiere, Moira fears she's responsible for the death of a motel guest, while David and Patrick decide to make their budding romance official. (Repeat). (Family, Comedy)

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After finding a positive pregnancy test, Johnny braces himself for the possibility of a new baby in the family, while David and Patrick search for some privacy. (Repeat). (Family, Comedy)

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship newscast, featuring depth and context from the CBC's bureaus across the country and around the world. (Repeat).

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki helps a couple from London to figure out what they want from their new life in Devon. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: As grim magic contaminates the academy's water supply, the unicorns risk losing their power. (New). (Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Action & Adventure)

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: When Nibbles the microraptor attempts to steal Pa's birthday pies, the Ranchers suspect Tango, and she must establish her innocence. (New). (Family, Comedy, Action & Adventure)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Katie enters one of the pups in a grooming contest. (Repeat). (Comedy, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Super Agent Jon le Bon
programme.desc: Whitewash is accidentally given control of all of the Agency's systems. (Repeat).

programme.title: Rusty Rivets
programme.desc: A trapped opossum is saved by Rusty and Ruby. (Repeat). (Family, Comedy, Educational, Kids)

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Mr. Grubber gives Paddington a metal detector as a gift. He had a lot of fun using it at first, but the device can also be a source of a few troubles. (Repeat). (Family, Kids)

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: In the premiere of the series, it's the day of the Rainbow King's dance party, and True unites with Bartleby to cheer up a discouraged DJ after Grizelda upsets him. (Repeat). (Comedy, Educational)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: A farmer's carrots vanish. (Repeat). (Comedy, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Jon's confidence causes him to make a series of careless mistakes while helping Tara make an important delivery. (Repeat). (Family, Comedy, Action & Adventure)

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Tooey gets to decide which one of Cali's puppies to keep and train as a lead sled dog. (Repeat). (Comedy, Educational, Kids)

programme.title: Big Blue
programme.desc: The Seahorse King's scepter is almost stolen. The Calypso crew is tasked with keeping watch for the thief at the Seahorse Celebration. (Repeat).

programme.title: Super Agent Jon le Bon
programme.desc: Jon finds himself inside EVA's systems and he must save her before it's too late. (Repeat).

programme.title: Our Vancouver
programme.desc: Weekly news, entertainment and interviews. (New).

programme.title: Absolutely Canadian
programme.desc: Dylan Jewers is on a personal quest to track down extraordinary Nova Scotia musicians from a variety of cultural communities whose music bridges the gap between the past and the present. (Repeat).

programme.title: CBC Docs POV
programme.desc: A look into the lives of artists, small businesses and gallery owners after losing Honest Ed's and the surrounding buildings. (New). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: This week in the Den, an entrepreneur hopes the Dragons think his business is ripe. Also, a chiropractor looks to pump the Dragons for a deal; and an entrepreneur seeks to sell the Dragons on his trashy business. Plus, a couple looks to prove that where there's a will there's a way. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: FIVB Volleyball Nations League
programme.desc: (New).

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A wild stallion escapes from Sam's ranch during a burglary and Amy will stop at nothing to find him. Lisa's latest business investment is at risk. Tim and Jessica adjust to life back at Heartland. (Repeat). (Drama, Family, Comedy)

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: A look at how magic is a unique tool for gaining new insights into the human mind. (Repeat). (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: CBC Docs POV
programme.desc: A group of inmates begins a new farming project within their prison. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: CBC News Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top stories and breaking news from across Canada and around the world. (New).

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Three Newfoundland housewives plunge into the world of the outdoors, that may have once been considered a man's domain. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: The human voice is a highly advanced communication tool, yet many individuals lack the knowledge to fully utilize its potential. (Repeat). (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Absolutely Canadian
programme.desc: The inside story that weaves together the rich history of the authentic Cowichan Sweater, who knits them, and how and why they became the beautiful, strong icon of the Coast Salish Peoples. (Repeat).

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: A fitness duo looks to climb the ladder of success; a fashion forward entrepreneur seeks investment to keep his brand in vogue; a mom looks for a Dragon partner to subscribe to adventure; and a sibling team hopes to make the Dragons mobile. (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: (Repeat).

programme.title: CBC Vancouver News
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of Vancouver events, sports, and weather. (New).

programme.title: Bones of Crows
programme.desc: A Cree matriarch, a survivor of residential schools, recounts her struggle to preserve her daughter and obtain redress for the tragedies she endured. (Repeat). (Drama)

programme.title: The Rick Mercer Report
programme.desc: Rick goes to Ferryland, Newfoundland and helps transport a flock of sheep across the water and then joins Toronto construction workers 50 stories above the city. (Repeat). (Comedy, Sports)

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Red Snow is a dramatic adventure that begins when Dylan, a Gwich'in soldier from the Canadian Arctic, is caught in an ambush in Panjwayi, Afghanistan. His capture and interrogation by a Taliban Commander releases a cache of memories connected to the love and death of his Inuit cousin, Asana, and binds him closer to a Pashtun family as they escape across treacherous landscapes and through a blizzard that becomes their key to survival. (Repeat). (Horror, Comedy, Suspense)

programme.title: The Rick Mercer Report
programme.desc: Rick is in Edmonton for the annual Deep Freeze Byzantine Winter Festival where he races a deep freezer through city streets and gets some dance lessons; then he is off to Mississauga, Ontario, to check out action at the North American International Motorcycle Supershow. (Repeat). (Comedy, Sports)

programme.title: The Rick Mercer Report
programme.desc: Rick boards an ice-breaking vessel in Toronto harbor and learns how to keep shipping lanes open. Also: a visit to the Interior Design Show. (Repeat). (Comedy, Sports)

programme.title: The Rick Mercer Report
programme.desc: Rick checks in with athletes headed to the Winter Olympics, including figure skaters Scott Moir, Tessa Virtue and Patrick Chan; bobsledders Kaillie Humphries and Jesse Lumsden; and biathlete Megan Tandy. Also: an interview with broadcaster Scott Russell. (Repeat). (Comedy, Sports)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, Nicki and a couple from Scotland look for the cottage of their dreams on a £600,000 budget. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Remy & Boo
programme.desc: An intense game causes Remy and Boo to stop playing together. They draw a line, agreeing to stay apart. (Repeat).

programme.title: Glowbies
programme.desc: Mayor Mary makes Randy the Mayor of Brighthouse Bay for the Day. (Repeat).

programme.title: Kiri & Lou
programme.desc: Lou and Kiri are upset with each other, but they do not remember why. (Repeat). (Family, Educational)

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom – Music & Dance Video
programme.desc: When the Rainbow King wants to take a break from granting wishes, he turns himself into a Rock Critter, leaving his magic wand behind. But when his trusty herald Zee doesn't recognize him, the Rock Critter King must find a way to turn himself back in this True-ly silly version of "The Frog Prince". (Repeat).

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monster has to overcome his fears of the big slide to rescue Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny. (Repeat). (Fantasy, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Becca's Bunch
programme.desc: Mayor Ladymaus asks Wagtailers to make artwork to celebrate how much they love Wagtail Woods, and Becca worries her picture is too small, not knowing she has created a tiny masterpiece. (Repeat). (Family, Educational, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Mighty Express
programme.desc: Flicker is tasked with picking up recycling all over town, but when the stack gets too high, trouble ensues. (Repeat).

programme.title: Mini-Jon and Mini-Maple
programme.desc: Henry gives the mini-clones a very special task: to find the android who has infiltrated the Agency. It could be anyone, even an agent. (Repeat). (Comedy)

programme.title: Kingdom Force
programme.desc: Kingdom Force defends a bear village from an ice monster but this newly discovered creature might not be the enemy. (Repeat). (Comedy, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Miguel rushes through his important jobs so he can work on his invention. (Repeat). (Family, Comedy, Action & Adventure)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Rubble's first day with the gang is recalled. (Repeat). (Comedy, Action & Adventure, Kids)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Abi accuses Dean of disseminating the tapes, while Carla is surprised to see a portrait of Peter. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin gets loose on the wrong man, and Daniel discovers a surprise at home. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kit discovers Sarah planting false evidence to accuse Nathan of Lauren's death. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: DS Swain visits Roy to ask for the true cause of his and Carla's estrangement. (Repeat). (Drama, Soap)

programme.title: Our Vancouver
programme.desc: Weekly news, entertainment and interviews. (Repeat).

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Spotlighting a family business in outport Newfoundland. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Exhibitionists
programme.desc: Artist-poet d'bi Young; painter Lauren Brevner. (Repeat).

programme.title: Kayak to Klemtu
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is determined to protect her ancestral land from fuel barges, oil spills, and the construction of an oil pipeline. She and a small group embark on a kayak trip to a small, remote island in an act of defiance and protection. (Repeat). (Travel, Family, Action & Adventure)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin returns to East Sussex, where Adrian and Megan's cutting-edge concrete bunker is complete. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Best in Miniatures

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: (Repeat). (Reality, Business)

programme.title: Still Standing

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: In this engaging mystery set in 1930s Europe, detective Hercule Poirot probes a murder aboard the Orient Express. As the thirteen passengers grow paranoid that the killer will strike again, Poirot realizes there's more to the case than meets the eye. (New). (Drama, Suspense)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: CBC Newsroom with Deana Sumanac-Johnson
programme.desc: Deana Sumanac-Johnson brings Canadians the latest breaking news from across Canada and around the world. (News)

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. With the help of hidden cameras, correspondents dish out the dirt on not so "clean" business practices. Once they get the evidence they need on tape, they apply pressure on businesses to change policies vis-a-vis the products and services they provide to the public. (Consumer)

programme.title: CBC News Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top stories and breaking news from across Canada and around the world. (News)

programme.title: CBC News: At Issue
programme.desc: Rosemary Barton hosts this half-hour political forum, which features panelists discussing the week's biggest stories and hottest topics in Canadian politics. (Talk, Politics)

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking. (Newsmagazine)

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: A documentary offering informative views about the state of the world and how to make it a better place. Produced in Canada and abroad, all offer a look at the way the planet changes and shifts in humanity's modernized age. (Documentary, Science, Nature)

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality. (Religious)

programme.desc: The Blue Bombers (0-2) try to get back on track when they host the Lions (1-1). Winnipeg's surprising start continued with a 23-19 loss to Ottawa in Week 2. Vernon Adams Jr. threw for two TDs and rushed for another in BC's 26-17 win over Calgary. (Football)

programme.desc: The NASCAR Xfinity Series rolls into New Hampshire Motor Speedway for the Sci Aps 200. Tire troubles plagued the Hy-Vee Perks 250 at Iowa on June 15, sidelining multiple race contenders. Sam Mayer navigated the track for his second win of 2024. (Auto racing)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Georgia contests Czechia in Hamburg in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. This is the first match between these teams. Georgia is the only nation making its EUROs debut at this tournament. Czechia was EURO 1976 winners (as Czechoslovakia). (Soccer)

programme.title: Euro Today
programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Türkiye is up against Portugal in Dortmund in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. Portugal won all three EUROs matches versus Türkiye: 1-0 in the EURO 1996 group stage, 2-0 in the EURO 2000 quarter-finals and 2-0 in the EURO 2008 group stage. (Soccer)

programme.title: Euro Today
programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Belgium contests Romania in Cologne in Group E of EURO 2024. The only competitive meetings were in 1994 World Cup qualifying. Belgium won 1-0 in Brussels (goal by Rudy Smidts) and Romania won 2-1 in Bucharest (home goals by Raducioiu and Dumitrescu). (Soccer)

programme.desc: Marinette seems to be a normal teenage girl -- she dreams of becoming a fashion designer, is a bit awkward and has a crush on a classmate. But she has a secret other teenagers don't have -- she lives a double life as a crime-fighting superhero known as Ladybug. She uses her superpowers to help protect her native Paris from supervillain Hawk Moth. She is assisted, reluctantly, by fellow hero Cat Noir, even though she insists she doesn't need him -- a stance she might not take if she knew his alter ego is her crush, Adrien. Together, Ladybug and Cat Noir help keep Paris safe from Hawk Moth and other villains. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

When the unbearable Deetzes (Catherine O'Hara, Jeffrey Jones) and teen daughter Lydia (Winona Ryder) buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. programme.title: Life, Liberty & Levin
programme.desc: Mark Levin hosts FOX News Channel's "Life, Liberty and Levin." The program aims to explore the fundamental values and principles of American society, politics, culture, and current events and the impact that these things have on the nation's future and the everyday lives of the citizens. Levin also hosts "The Mark Levin Show," and prior to joining FOX, he served as an adviser to some of President Ronald Reagan's cabinet members. (News)

programme.title: Sunday Morning Futures With Maria Bartiromo
programme.desc: As part of her role as FOX Business Network's global markets editor, business journalist Maria Bartiromo hosts this weekly Sunday morning show on FBN sister network FOX News Channel that focuses more on the general economy than the stock market specifically. The hourlong show provides viewers with information about how recent news events affect the economy. In addition, Bartiromo interviews business leaders and newsmakers on topics that include job creation and investment opportunities. (Bus./financial)

programme.title: MediaBuzz
programme.desc: Veteran journalist Howard Kurtz is no stranger to criticizing the media. He did it for 20 years as a media columnist for The Washington Post and as host of CNN's long-running "Reliable Sources" from 1998 through the first half of 2013. So it's no surprise that shortly after departing CNN in mid-2013 for rival Fox News Channel he would premiere a show for his new employer that is modeled after his previous program. In addition to Kurtz and his weekly panel discussing how the press covers a variety of topics that include technology, social media, politics and sports, the host also interviews some of the country's top journalists. And, as you might expect in these social mediacentric times, "MediaBuzz" features some viewers' questions and comments on the show. (News, Talk, Public affairs, Politics)

programme.desc: This early morning show is for people who enjoy the information they get from "FOX and Friends" but want it earlier. They report on the day's headlines while offering viewers the latest information regarding health, legal, political and lifestyle topics. Consider this the pregame show for the main "FOX and Friends" show that follows it. (Newsmagazine)

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Approximately 51 percent of the U.S. population is made up of women, but on "Outnumbered" the female advantage jumps to a 4-1 ratio. The hourlong show features a rotating panel of four women and one man discussing the day's headlines from various perspectives. In addition to the top news of the hour, the panelists discuss leading pop culture and relationship issues making headlines that day. Regular FNC and FBN contributors appearing on the show on a rotational basis include Harris Faulkner, Meghan McCain and Pete Hegseth. (News)

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum has been part of the Fox News family for a number of years but made the jump to prime time while chronicling the first 100 days of President Trump's administration. Now she's branching out to cover all of the happenings in the nation's capital on "The Story." She keeps viewers up-to-date on the critical decisions, political maneuvers and key developments coming out of D.C. Through interviews with guests and reports from the network's roster of correspondents, MacCallum goes in-depth on the stories that matter to viewers. (News)

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham is one of the most listened to women on political talk radio in the country. Ingraham earned a B.A. degree at Dartmouth college and a Juris Doctor degree at the University of Virginia School of Law. She took the knowledge from her J.D. degree and applied it to serve as a litigator and Supreme Court law clerk. She is also the best-selling author of five books. Tune in to watch"The Ingraham Angle," as the program serves to discuss the issues that are being overlooked and other issues that are causing turmoil in the United States. (News)

programme.title: Saturday Night Live ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Live from New York for more than four decades, celebrity hosts join an award-winning ensemble cast to perform comedic sketches, satirical news and digital shorts, alongside popular musical acts. Capturing the pop-culture zeitgeist, the show's sketches and segments often go viral the next day. Over the years, cast members have included Jimmy Fallon, Will Ferrell, Tina Fey, Kate McKinnon, Seth Meyers, Eddie Murphy, Bill Murray, Mike Myers, Amy Poehler, Chris Rock, Maya Rudolph, Andy Samberg, Kristen Wiig, and many more, as well as recurring guests such as Alec Baldwin, Melissa McCarthy and Steve Martin. From executive producer Lorne Michaels, "SNL" is widely considered an American late-night institution and continues to earn critical praise.

programme.title: 48 Hours ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: After Midnight ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Inspired by Comedy Central's Emmy Award-winning series "@midnight," "After Midnight" is the smartest show on television about the dumbest things on the internet. With celebrated comedian Taylor Tomlinson at the helm and a panel of guests from the worlds of entertainment, comedy, music and beyond, the late-night comedy series features looks into what has set the internet abuzz that day with a game show feel.

programme.title: The Talk ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: From creator Sara Gilbert -- who also served as a host and executive producer for the first nine seasons -- "The Talk" features discussion on current events, pop culture, contemporary issues and family. Co-hosts include Akbar Gbajabiamila, Amanda Kloots, Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell and Sheryl Underwood. In addition to interviews with celebrities and newsmakers, the program features musical performances, cooking segments and how-to demonstrations. The roster of celebrity guest co-hosts includes the likes of Jordana Brewster, Aisha Tyler, Scott Wolf, Carnie Wilson and Kelly Osbourne.
